nasb.text: “Behold, I waited for your words, I listened to your reasonings, While you pondered what to say.

esv.text: “Behold, I waited for your words, I listened for your wise sayings, while you searched out what to say.

cnv.text: 你們砌詞說話的時候， 我等待著你們的話， 留心聽你們的理論。

ccb.text: 看啊，我一直等候你们发言， 倾听你们的理论， 等你们斟词酌句。
